About us

We are a dental clinic where they have time for you. We work with equipment that lets us be precise, and with an approach that lets you be at ease.

How we work

Dentiyak is a clinic built on a simple principle — do things properly and take the time for them. We don't chase patient numbers. Every treatment starts with a consultation where we go through what's needed together and propose a treatment plan with a clear price.

We have our own dental laboratory — crowns, bridges and prosthetic work are made in-house. That means shorter waiting times, direct communication with the technician and quality control from start to finish.

We work with a 3D X-ray, surgical microscope and intraoral scanner. We use PRF therapy — a regenerative method using the patient's own blood that supports healing after surgical procedures. And for patients who are anxious about treatment, we offer nitrous oxide.

Reception

What we work with

3D X-ray (CBCT)

A three-dimensional image showing bone structure, the position of nerves and roots. The basis for planning implants and surgical procedures.

Surgical microscope

Magnification that allows you to see details invisible to the naked eye. More precise work, smaller interventions.

Intraoral scanner

Digital dental impression without unpleasant impression material. More precise, faster, more comfortable.

Own laboratory

Crowns, bridges and prosthetic work made on-site — direct quality control, shorter waiting times.

PRF centrifuge

Preparation of a concentrate from the patient's own blood to support natural healing after procedures.

Contracted insurance companies

For procedures covered by insurance you pay nothing. Non-standard treatment (implants, aesthetics, whitening, hygiene) is paid directly — we will tell you the price in advance after consultation.

VZP (111)ČPZP (205)OZP (207)VoZP (201)ZPMV (211)

Would you like to meet us in person?

Call us — we'll arrange a first consultation where we go through what you need and propose a plan.
